user.title: Weather Underground Personal Weather Station
user.description: Enter your Wunderground station ID (e.g. IPUNIL11). The API key will be discovered automatically from the Wunderground dashboard.

data_description.station_id: Your PWS station ID (e.g. IPUNIL11). Find it at https://www.wunderground.com/dashboard/pws/YOUR_STATION_ID

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Weather Underground PWS
reauth_confirm.description: Click Submit to refresh the API key for station {station_id}.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Weather Underground. Check your internet connection.
error.api_key_not_found: Could not find the API key in the Wunderground dashboard. The station ID may be invalid or the page structure may have changed.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This weather station is already configured.
